name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Be specific. "I want X" is less useful than "I can't do Y because Z." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How should it work? Keep it concrete. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you consider? Why does this approach win? -->

## Use case

<!-- Who benefits from this? How common is the scenario? -->

## Implementation notes (optional)

<!-- Relevant files, existing patterns to follow, or known constraints. -->
